title: Smiles For Miles
description: This texture pack, Smiles for Miles, adds some positivity to your gameplay! This texture pack adds smiles to many items, entities, and even hearts! This pack can be used for anything---PvP, SMP, and more! I created this pack a very long time ago. Enjoy! :)
body:
This texture pack, **Smiles for Miles**, adds some happiness to your gameplay!
### (updated to 1.21)!

This texture pack adds smiles to many items, entities, and even hearts! This pack can be used for anything---**PvP, SMP, and more**! Enjoy! 🙂
Some entities made happy:
Zombies, skeletons, zombie villagers, pillagers, vindicators, evokers, villagers, cows, creepers, end crystals, shields, and more!
Some items changed: Golden apple, enchanted golden apple, end crystal, respawn anchor, and more!
